identity: Human MAN (male, NORMAL HUMAN HEIGHT — NOT a dwarf, NOT short-statured, NOT a halfling), about 32 years old, broad-shouldered blacksmith build, short-cropped black hair, thick black beard, soot-smudged cheekbones, intense amber eyes.
outfit: Dark brown leather blacksmith apron over a gray wool tunic, rolled-up sleeves revealing muscular forearms, heavy brown leather gauntlets. Glowing orange-gold runic sigils etched and faintly shining into the apron, gauntlets, and belt buckle.
weapons: A heavy iron blacksmith hammer with glowing orange runes carved into the head and haft, held in the right hand. A small rune-inscribed bronze anvil icon on the belt. No sword.
attackStyle: East-facing. Blacksmith hammer swung in a high overhead arc in the right hand, runes on the hammer glowing bright orange, sparks flying.
spellStyle: East-facing. Hammer held low, left hand raised with a glowing orange rune hovering above the palm, runes on the gauntlets shining.
blockStyle: East-facing. Hammer haft held horizontally across the chest in both hands, runes on apron glowing faintly.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling, hammer dropped beside him, head bowed, apron and runes dimmed.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm idle. Hammer resting head-down at his side in the right hand, NORMAL HUMAN HEIGHT (NOT a dwarf), beard and apron clearly visible, runic sigils glowing softly.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Soot-smudged face, thick black beard, short black hair, dark leather apron with glowing orange runes, rune-glowing blacksmith hammer head visible over the right shoulder. NORMAL HUMAN PROPORTIONS.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human MAN (male, NORMAL HUMAN HEIGHT — NOT a dwarf, NOT short-statured, NOT a halfling), about 32 years old, broad-shouldered blacksmith build, short-cropped black hair, thick black beard, soot-smudged cheekbones, intense amber eyes.

OUTFIT: Dark brown leather blacksmith apron over a gray wool tunic, rolled-up sleeves revealing muscular forearms, heavy brown leather gauntlets. Glowing orange-gold runic sigils etched and faintly shining into the apron, gauntlets, and belt buckle.

WEAPONS: A heavy iron blacksmith hammer with glowing orange runes carved into the head and haft, held in the right hand. A small rune-inscribed bronze anvil icon on the belt. No sword.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

AGE & PROPORTIONS (non-negotiable): character is a fully-grown adult about 28-32 years old with standard heroic adult proportions (approximately 6 feet / 180 cm tall). NOT a child, NOT a teenager, NOT elderly, NOT a graybeard wizard.

BODY PROPORTIONS (non-negotiable): realistic adult human head-to-body ratio — the head is approximately 1/7 to 1/8 of the total body height. TALL and SLENDER with long adult legs (roughly half of total height), a full-length adult torso, and normal-sized adult shoulders. NOT chibi, NOT bobblehead, NOT big-head-small-body, NOT child-bodied, NOT stubby. The silhouette must read as a tall adult, never as a kid in adult clothes.

SCALE (non-negotiable): full-body figure occupies approximately 85% of the 256x256 canvas height, feet near the bottom edge, head near the top — consistent scale with other adult humanoid characters in the same sprite set.

LIGHTING (non-negotiable): bright evenly-lit pixel art, NOT silhouetted, NOT overly dark, NOT cast in deep shadow. All colors, facial features, and outfit details must be fully readable.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.
